goal: Produce a repo-grounded optimization iteration roadmap for the next project rounds.
constraints: Do not implement code changes in this turn
Base the roadmap on current repo state and recent governed artifacts
Prefer bounded optimization over rewrite-first advice
acceptance_criteria: The iterations point to real repo hotspots
The plan states what should remain deferred
product_acceptance_criteria: The roadmap should be usable as the next implementation review input
The sequence should reduce risk before reopening more product breadth
manual_spot_checks: Check current import and operations backend paths
Check current large frontend and backend hotspot files
Confirm validation baseline on the current branch
completion_language_policy: Only claim completion after the roadmap is written, repo-grounded, and clearly bounded as planning-only output.
delivery_truth_contract: Describe only recommended work and confirmed repo observations, not unimplemented outcomes.
non_goals: Pulling enterprise workflow scope into the next round
inferred_assumptions: Maintainability and release confidence are now higher-leverage than adding several new top-level features.
The import/OCR flow remains a core business path even after recent lifecycle hardening.
Recent work on operations and supplier analytics is best consolidated before more surface-area growth.
